name: pi-fetch-markdown
description: Pi skill: fetch any web page as clean markdown via Cloudflare content negotiation or Jina Reader
readme:
# pi-fetch-markdown

A [pi](https://github.com/nichochar/pi-coding-agent) skill that fetches any web page as clean, token-efficient markdown.

## How It Works

Two strategies, tried in order:

1. **Content Negotiation** — Sends `Accept: text/markdown` header. Sites using Cloudflare's [Markdown for Agents](https://blog.cloudflare.com/markdown-for-agents/) return markdown directly (~80% fewer tokens than HTML).
2. **Jina Reader** (fallback) — Routes through `r.jina.ai` which renders the page and extracts clean markdown.

## Usage

```bash
# Basic
bash ./fetch-markdown.sh "https://example.com/page"

# With metadata (method used, token count, content signals)
bash ./fetch-markdown.sh "https://example.com/page" --info
```

## Installation

Install it as a pi package:

```bash
pi install npm:pi-fetch-markdown
```

pi installs the package and loads the skill automatically.

## Requirements

- `curl`
